subject: Create VF Module fails with preprocess error.
commit_message:
Create VF Module fails with preprocess error.

This change is pertinent to jira issue so-1111
Catalogdb pod fails to start error Updated catalogdb override files.
updated so monitoring related files.

Change-Id: I0f68bec89557f400f69cf7684155d0795bc4b939
Issue-ID: SO-1111
Signed-off-by: Ramesh Parthasarathy(rp6768)<ramesh.parthasarathy@att.com>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

new so-monitering container. there is a confd configmap that does not start with dev-so created so it doesnt auto-delete and helm del dev-so the container sticks in terminating. Also doesnt come up on helm deploy stuck in init phase

Patch Set 2:

> new so-monitering container. there is a confd configmap that does
 > not start with dev-so created so it doesnt auto-delete and helm del
 > dev-so the container sticks in terminating. Also doesn't come up on
 > helm deploy stuck in init phase
Hi Brian, This SO monitoring pod has been created by Ericsson team and their configmap was missing an application configmap and override file. With the above changes at SO env, it is able to go past init phase. However the application doesn't start fully, fails for health checks and I don't see any application logs to identify the issue with the application. I am working with Rob to find the root cause of this issue. 
We need this CatalogDBAdapater change in urgently as this is blocking So testing. Can you please approve this and I will ensure that this so monitoring issue is addressed shortly.
